case_title: CELINA HUONG PHAM VS. MANITO REGIO et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-11-2005 CONTINUED TO MAY-06-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212,. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-20-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHAM, CELINA HUONG AS TO DEFENDANT REGIO, MANITO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-11-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-07-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-24-2005

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-20-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-06-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
